creator: gouders@et.bocholt.fh-ge.de
text:
After installing the port textproc/jade and having a look into 
/usr/local/share/doc/jade, I find the documentation for sp(1) instead
of jade(1).

Because I can find the proper documentation at 
http://www.jclark.com/jade/, I guess that the directory 
/usr/local/share/doc/jade/ does not contain what it should.
